display.purpose: Hero headline only. Single most prominent element.

label.purpose: Nav, badges, tags. Silkscreen 700, uppercase, tracked.

mono.purpose: Terminal output, code. VT323, ASCII subset.

shadows.name: bevel-raised
shadows.value: border: 2px solid; border-color: oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270)
shadows.purpose: NeXT mode 3D raised appearance for interactive elements.

shadows.name: bevel-sunken
shadows.value: border: 2px solid; border-color: oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270)
shadows.purpose: NeXT mode 3D sunken appearance for inset fields.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus).

motion.name: scanline-scroll
motion.purpose: CRT scanline vertical scroll in NeXT mode.

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. Flat in Mac, beveled in NeXT. Teal background in dark.
components.css: .ds-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 12px 24px; background: oklch(14% 0.008 65); color: oklch(99.5% 0.004 85); font-family: Silkscreen, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid oklch(14% 0.008 65); text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms, color 150ms; border-radius: 0; } .ds-cta:hover { background: oklch(78% 0.16 75); color: oklch(14% 0.008 65); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-cta { background: oklch(62% 0.07 170); color: oklch(6% 0.005 270); border: 2px solid; border-color: oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270); } .ds-cta:hover { background: oklch(34% 0.006 270); color: oklch(6% 0.005 270); } } .ds-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(78% 0.16 75); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Icon Square
components.description: Fixed-size square with accent background. Contains SVG icon or bold character.
components.css: .ds-icon-square { width: 48px; height: 48px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: oklch(78% 0.16 75); flex-shrink: 0; border: 1px solid oklch(14% 0.008 65); border-radius: 0; } .ds-icon-square svg { color: oklch(14% 0.008 65); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-icon-square { background: oklch(62% 0.07 170); border: 2px solid; border-color: oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270); } .ds-icon-square svg { color: oklch(6% 0.005 270); } }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed top navigation with logo, section links, and theme toggle. Active pill highlights.
components.html:
RezusCloud
HomeFeatures
components.css: .ds-nav { position: fixed; top: 0; width: 100%; z-index: 50; background: oklch(88.5% 0.006 85); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(72% 0.005 85); font-family: Silkscreen, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-inner { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 24px; height: 56px; } .ds-nav-logo { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: oklch(14% 0.008 65); text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: 0.025em; } .ds-nav-logo span { color: oklch(78% 0.16 75); } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-link { padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: oklch(30% 0.008 65); text-decoration: none; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; transition: background 120ms; border-radius: 0; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: oklch(95.5% 0.004 85); } .ds-nav-link-active { background: oklch(99.5% 0.004 85); color: oklch(14% 0.008 65); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-nav { background: oklch(20% 0.006 270); border-bottom-color: oklch(34% 0.006 270); } .ds-nav-logo { color: oklch(88% 0.004 270); } .ds-nav-logo span { color: oklch(52% 0.08 170); } .ds-nav-link { color: oklch(72% 0.012 85); } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: oklch(34% 0.006 270); } .ds-nav-link-active { background: oklch(58% 0.006 270); color: oklch(6% 0.005 270); } }

components.name: Terminal
components.description: VT323 monospace code block with title bar and blinking cursor.
components.html:
$ rezusctl init
* SYSTEM CHECK: ALL CLEAR
$ _
components.css: .ds-terminal { border: 1px solid oklch(72% 0.005 85); font-family: VT323, Courier New, monospace; font-size: 16px; background: oklch(14% 0.008 65); color: oklch(99.5% 0.004 85); border-radius: 0; overflow: hidden; } .ds-terminal-titlebar { padding: 8px 12px; background: oklch(88.5% 0.006 85); display: flex; gap: 6px; } .ds-terminal-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 0; } .ds-terminal-dot:nth-child(1) { background: oklch(50% 0.12 25); } .ds-terminal-dot:nth-child(2) { background: oklch(78% 0.16 75); } .ds-terminal-dot:nth-child(3) { background: oklch(55% 0.12 150); } .ds-terminal-body { padding: 16px; line-height: 1.6; } .ds-terminal-prompt { color: oklch(78% 0.16 75); } .ds-terminal-cursor { animation: ds-blink 1s step-end infinite; } @keyframes ds-blink { 0%, 49% { opacity: 1; } 50%, 100% { opacity: 0; } } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-terminal { border: 2px solid; border-color: oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270); background: oklch(6% 0.005 270); color: oklch(88% 0.004 270); } .ds-terminal-titlebar { background: oklch(20% 0.006 270); } .ds-terminal-prompt { color: oklch(52% 0.08 170); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-terminal-cursor { animation: none; } }

components.name: Accent Bar
components.description: Short horizontal bar used as section heading underline.
components.css: .ds-accent-bar { width: 48px; height: 4px; background: oklch(78% 0.16 75); border-radius: 0; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-accent-bar { background: oklch(62% 0.07 170); } }

components.name: Tech Tag
components.description: Small inline chip for technology labels. Beveled in NeXT mode.
components.css: .ds-tech-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 8px 12px; background: oklch(88.5% 0.006 85); border: 1px solid oklch(72% 0.005 85); font-family: Silkscreen, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: oklch(14% 0.008 65); border-radius: 0; transition: border-color 120ms; } .ds-tech-tag:hover { border-color: oklch(78% 0.16 75); } .ds-tech-dot { width: 4px; height: 4px; background: oklch(78% 0.16 75); margin-right: 6px; flex-shrink: 0; border-radius: 0; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-tech-tag { background: oklch(6% 0.005 270); border: 2px solid; border-color: oklch(55% 0.006 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(2% 0.004 270) oklch(55% 0.006 270); color: oklch(88% 0.004 270); } .ds-tech-tag:hover { border-color: oklch(52% 0.08 170); } .ds-tech-dot { background: oklch(62% 0.07 170); } }

narrative.overview:
Two operating systems, one machine. Light mode is a 1984 Macintosh 128K: bitmap fonts, 1px borders, stark contrast, amber highlights on warm white. Dark mode is a 1988 NeXTcube: 3D beveled edges, CRT scanlines, phosphor afterglow, muted teal on deep black. The site is not decorated to look retro. It IS retro, running natively in the browser.

The system is defiant, precise, and nostalgic. Every element earns its place. No rounded corners, no gradient text, no glassmorphism, no SaaS hero-metric template, no identical card grids. The layout principle is flat: text flows without container boxes, spacing varies for rhythm, and section backgrounds alternate between two surface levels.

For the brand strategy, storytelling context, and anti-references behind this visual system, see PRODUCT.md.
keyCharacteristics: Zero border-radius everywhere. Every corner is a right angle.
Dual-era identity: Mac System 1 in light, NeXTSTEP in dark. Fonts stay the same, only colors change.
Committed color strategy: amber gold (light) / teal (dark) carry the accent load across 30-40% of visible surface.
Flat text layout: no boxes wrapping content, no bordered cards.
3D bevel system for NeXT mode: 2px raised/sunken borders on interactive elements.
CRT overlay: scanline pattern at 4px intervals with slow vertical scroll animation.
Bitmap typography: Silkscreen for headings/labels/nav, system-ui for body, VT323 for terminals.
All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion. FOUC prevention via inline script.

rules.name: The Dual-Accent Rule
rules.body: Light mode uses amber gold. Dark mode uses teal. Never mix: amber never appears in dark mode, teal never appears in light mode. Each accent occupies the same structural positions in both modes.

rules.name: The Alternating Rhythm Rule
rules.body: Sections alternate between two background levels. Light: paper and surface. Dark: next-black and next-dark. The challenge section inverts: ink (light) and next-dark (dark). This rhythm never breaks.

rules.name: The No-Gray-Accent Rule
rules.body: In NeXT mode, next-light is a bright neutral for UI chrome (active nav pills only). It is never used for accent purposes. That role belongs exclusively to next-teal.

rules.name: The No-Serif Rule
rules.body: Serif fonts never appear. The system is entirely sans-serif + bitmap + mono.

rules.name: The Font-Consistency Rule
rules.body: Font families are identical between light and dark modes. Only colors change.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Mode Rule
rules.body: Mac mode is always flat: borders are always 1px solid ink. NeXT mode uses bevels: borders are always 2px with directional shading. Never mix bevel styles within a mode.

dos: Do use zero border-radius on every element. Every corner is a right angle.
Do use Silkscreen for all headings, labels, and nav. system-ui for body. VT323 for terminals only.
Do alternate section backgrounds every section. Paper/surface (light), next-black/next-dark (dark).
Do use amber gold (light) / teal (dark) as the exclusive accent.
Do use 2px bevels in NeXT mode for interactive elements.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion. All animations must have a static fallback.
Do use warm-tinted neutrals. Hue 85 (amber) for Mac, hue 270 (cool) for NeXT.
Do vary section padding for rhythm.
donts: Don't use rounded corners anywhere. No border-radius.
Don't use glassmorphism. No blur overlays, no frosted glass cards.
Don't wrap text in bordered container boxes. Layout is flat.
Don't mix accent colors between modes. Amber never in dark, teal never in light.
Don't use #000 or #fff. All neutrals are tinted with brand hue.
Don't use next-light as an accent color. Teal is the accent.
Don't animate CSS layout properties. Animate opacity and transform only.
Don't use bounce, elastic, or spring easings.
